The Pursuit of Pure Learning: How Acharya Jadunath Sarkar Built his Private Library

# The Pursuit of Pure Learning: How Acharya Jadunath Sarkar Built his Private Library

### Jadunath Sarkar spent a fortune from his pocket for building a vast and invaluable personal library, which became the singular hub for studying the medieval history of India.

## **Editor’s Note**

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

THE FOLLOWING ARE SOME delightful and inspirational excerpts from Acharya Jadunath Sarkar’s personal reminiscences on how he built up his personal library. Calling it a “personal library” is an understatement of epic proportions. In reality, his library arguably rivalled that of full-fledged universities and professional libraries. But we a…
